steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage explicitly states the exhibit “is essential viewing.” This assertion establishes that the exhibit has clear value and importance.

steps.title: Match to the dismissive action
steps.content: ”Overlook” means to fail to notice or disregard something. Since the exhibit is essential, it would be a mistake to overlook it—to treat valuable work as unworthy of attention. The other choices don't express dismissal: complicate refers to complexity, amplify means enhancement, and assemble describes assembly. That matches choice C — C is correct.
